prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 辽宁大学位于本省省会沈阳，为本省唯一省属211综合类大学，本地招生占比高（202 5年物理类计划1958人占该校物理类总计划主体），本省考生报考意愿较强，地域偏好正面；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等物理类主要招生专业方向2024–2026年持续高热推荐，报考关注度较高；本省2026年物理类考生估算约143000人，与2025年 143368人基本持平，考生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类扩招9.3%的缓解效应、 软科排名上升带来的吸引力增强、以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业的高报考热度，在2025年基准40128名基础上，扩招效应使位次后移约2238名，但排名上升和热门专业热度吸引 优质考生形成一定对冲；预测最低位次约42266名，区间41766–42766名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 36061 → 35249 → 38199 → 39805 → 40128, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4900 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 40128; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 1371 in 2021, 1512 in 2022, 1541 in 2023, 1867 in 2024, and 1958 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 2140, an increase of 182 (+9.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 125th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, up 6 places from 131st in 2025, with a stable upward trend and recognized comprehensive strength; in 2026, the reputation evaluation did not enter the high-attention list, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity total ranking 105th, rated as 'average', with moderately low exposure; no history of enrollment gaps, stable psychological expectations for applicants; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Economics, Finance, Public Finance, and International Economics and Trade, offering some disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Liaoning University is located in the provincial capital Shenyang, the only provincial-level 211 comprehensive university in the province, with a high proportion of local enrollment (the 2025 Physics Category plan of 1958 accounts for the majority of the university's total Physics Category plan), strong willingness of local candidates to apply, positive regional preference; majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, which are the main enrollment directions for Physics Category, have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high application attention; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 143,000, basically unchanged from 143,368 in 2025, with a stable candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of a 9.3% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, the increased appeal from the rising Soft Science ranking, and the high application enthusiasm for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, based on the 2025 baseline of 40128, the expansion effect causes a backward shift of about 2238 places, but the ranking rise and hot major appeal attract high-quality candidates, creating a certain offset; the predicted minimum ranking is about 42266, with a range of 41766–42766.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 8477 → 7885 → 8615 → 8143 → 8660, showing significant fluctuations with no clear single trend, oscillating between 8100 and 8700 in the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8660; provincial History Category enrollment plans were 587 in 2021, 611 in 2022, 653 in 2023, 690 in 2024, and 935 in 2025, with notable expansion in recent years; the 2026 plan is 990, an increase of 55 (+5.9%) over 2025, with continued expansion but a narrower margin compared to the previous two years, providing some relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 125th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, up 6 places from 131st in 2025, showing a steady rise; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, corresponding to History Category majors such as Economics, Finance, and Public Finance, offering some disciplinary appeal; the 2026 reputation evaluation did not enter the high-attention list, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranked 105th overall, rated as 'average'; no history of admission gaps, with stable psychological expectations for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot, Accounting/Finance/Auditing recommended, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Finance/Banking/Economics divided and wait-and-see; the overall popularity of History Category majors is positive; the estimated number of provincial History Category examinees in 2026 is about 57,000, an increase of about 676 (+1.2%) from 56,324 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Liaoning University is located in the provincial capital Shenyang, the only provincial 211 comprehensive university in the province, with a high proportion of local enrollment, strong willingness of local examinees to apply, and positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the oscillating characteristics of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of a 5.9% expansion in History Category in 2026, the enhanced appeal from the rising Soft Science ranking, and the slight increase in competition due to a small rise in examinee numbers, based on the 2025 baseline of 8660, the expansion effect shifts the ranking back by about 306 places, but the increase in examinees and ranking rise partially offset this; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8916, with a range of 8416–9416.
